SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic

Class DrawTable

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Model.Logic.DrawTable
public class DrawTable extends Object
Contains the cards that are ready to be picked by the players, and provide the methods to draw them

  • Constructor Details

    • DrawTable

      public DrawTable() throws EmptyDeckException
      Class constructor
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException

  • Method Details

    • getPublicCards

      public GameCard[] getPublicCards()
      Returns:
      an array of the 4 public drawable cards: 0 = gold card 1 1 = gold card 2 2 = resource card 1 3 = resource card 2

    • initializeDecks

      public void initializeDecks()
      Create 40 resource cards and put them into resDeck in random order. Create 40 gold cards and put them into goldDeck in random order.

    • getColorTopGoldDeck

      public CardColour getColorTopGoldDeck()
      Returns:
      the color of the top card of the gold deck (null if the deck is empty)

    • getColorTopResDeck

      public CardColour getColorTopResDeck()
      Returns:
      the color of the top ca of the resource deck (null if the deck is empty)

    • drawHiddenGold

      public GameCard drawHiddenGold() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw a gold card from the deck.
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if the gold deck is empty

    • drawHiddenResource

      public GameCard drawHiddenResource() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw a resource card from the deck.
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if the resource deck is empty

    • drawFirstGold

      public GameCard drawFirstGold() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw the first public gold card.
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if there is not a card in that position

    • drawSecondGold

      public GameCard drawSecondGold() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw the second public gold card.
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if there is not a card in that position

    • drawFirstResource

      public GameCard drawFirstResource() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw the first public resource card.
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if there is not a card in that position

    • drawSecondResource

      public GameCard drawSecondResource() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw the second public resource card.
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if there is not a card in that position

    • drawCard

      public GameCard drawCard(int index) throws EmptyDeckException
      Draw a card from the drawTable
      Parameters:
      index - An int that specifies which card has to be drawn: - index = 0 : public gold 1; - index = 1 : public gold 2; - index = 2 : public resource 1; - index = 3 : public resource 2; - index = 4 : hidden gold; - index >=5 : hidden resource;
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - there is not a card in the selected position
